title: U.S. and Iran launch fresh strikes following attacks on commercial ships
description: Iran said it had targeted more than 80 U.S. military facilities in Bahrain and Kuwait, after the U.S. launched strikes in response to attacks on commercial ships in the Strait of Hormuz.

title: At NATO summit in Turkey, Trump says he believes ceasefire with Iran is 'over'
description: President Trump said he believes the current ceasefire with Iran is over following an exchange of attacks between the U.S. and Iran in the latest escalation straining the agreement to end the war.

title: Ex-girlfriend of Graham Platner says he removed condoms without consent during sex
description: The campaign for the Democratic Senate candidate in Maine called the allegation “categorically false and politically motivated.”

title: Democratic factions vie to pick Platner replacement before he leaves Maine race
description: Potential candidates and their backers moved quickly to gain an edge in the contest over who would replace Graham Platner if he exits the key Senate race.

title: Maine voters, once loyal to Platner, abandon him after sexual assault allegation
description: Some voters said they stuck with the progressive candidate through several controversies, but drew the line after a new allegation of sex assault.

title: Supreme Court justices to make rare appearance before Congress
description: Elena Kagan and Amy Coney Barrett, a liberal and a conservative, are set to testify before a House subcommittee next Tuesday.

title: U.S. gave Tehran details on Iranian asylum seekers, lawsuit alleges
description: The claim, outlined in court papers, contends information shared with Iran could jeopardize the lives of pro-democracy protesters, religious minorities and LGTBQ people.

title: What comes next for the Platner campaign — and for Democrats
description: NPR's Scott Detrow talks with Adam Jentleson, a Democratic strategist and the founder and president of the liberal think tank the Searchlight Institute, about where Graham Platner goes from here.

title: What Graham Platner’s rise and unraveling reveal about the politics of 2026
description: In their rush to find a strong candidate to run against Sen. Susan Collins (R-Maine), Democrats should have more thoroughly vetted their party's nominee.

title: Pressure grows on Platner to leave Maine Senate race
description: Democratic nominee Graham Platner' high-profile U.S. Senate race has been thrown into chaos following a POLITICO report that he sexually assaulted a former girlfriend five years ago.

title: 6 potential replacements for Graham Platner if he drops out of Senate race
description: The Maine Democrat has faced an escalating string of scandals as he competes for a critical Senate seat that could determine control of the chamber.

title: New lawsuit alleges U.S. shared asylum application details with Iran
description: A lawsuit alleges the Trump administration is divulging details of Iranian asylum seekers to the government of Iran.

title: Graham Platner faces calls to leave Maine Senate race after sexual assault allegation
description: Graham Platner is facing growing pressure to end his campaign for U.S. Senate in Maine after Politico reported an allegation of sexual assault. Platner has denied the claim.

title: Democratic strategist says transparency is Platner's 'only path forward'
description: NPR's Steve Inskeep speaks with Democratic strategist Joel Payne about prominent Democrats on the national and state levels urging Graham Platner to withdraw from Maine's U.S. Senate race.

title: Meet 'Project 2029' — and its war on the annoyance economy
description: Remember Project 2025? Democrats are building their own governing blueprint, and one proposal takes aim at the "annoyance economy": robocalls, endless hold times, hidden fees and other everyday frustrations.

title: Trump's NATO pressure campaign continues as summit begins
description: President Trump's arrival in Ankara kicks off another potentially tense meeting for NATO.

title: Heirs of 'odious' 169-year-old Supreme Court ruling see modern parallels
description: Descendants of Dred Scott and Chief Justice Roger Taney spoke about reconciliation at a church in the shadow of the Supreme Court last week as the high court wrestled with race and who can be an American.

title: Gov. Sherrill ran on freezing electricity rates. Can she bring relief to New Jersey?
description: Gov. Mikie Sherrill, a Democrat, campaigned on freezing electricity rates in New Jersey. Six months into her term, can her campaign promises bring relief to the high cost of power in the Garden State?

title: Top Democrats pull Graham Platner endorsements, call on him to end Maine Senate campaign
description: The Democrat, who has withstood other scandals since launching his challenge to Sen. Susan Collins (R), is accused of sexual assault by a woman he previously dated.

title: China test-fires long-range missile into Pacific, rattling U.S. allies
description: The unprecedented test of a nuclear-capable submarine-launched missile highlights Beijing’s growing force in the region.

title: After America’s 250th, Trump will test how far he can push NATO allies
description: As NATO leaders gather in Turkey, they are preparing for another summit shaped as much by managing President Donald Trump as by the alliance's security agenda.
